title: TakenGetManifest
description: Output shape of `tagen get --json`. Stable contract — breaking changes require a dedicated PR and consumer update in lockstep.

modules.description: Skill names in the matched set, sorted alphabetically.

core.description: Repo-relative paths to core-tier files, union across all matched cards.

subagents.description: Deduplicated resolved subagents referenced by the matched cards.

refs.description: Reference files from slot-filling cards, tagged with the capability that filled the slot.

validators.description: Two-layer validator set: protocol validators (auto-applied) and card validators (opt-in).

protocol.description: Auto-derived validators from skill-graph/protocols/<name>/validator.ts for each emitted/consumed protocol that has a validator.

card.description: Card-level methodology validators from deep.validators on matched cards.

emits.description: Union of all protocols emitted across matched cards, sorted.

consumes.description: Union of all protocols consumed across matched cards, sorted.

warnings.description: Non-fatal composition warnings (unmet requires, unfilled slots, multiple providers). Agent decides whether to proceed.

slots.description: Resolved capability slots — one entry per capability needed by the composition.

ResolvedSubagent.description: A resolved subagent entry in the manifest.

name.description: Subagent name, matches filename stem in skill-graph/subagents/.

prompt.description: Repo-relative path to the subagent prompt file.

description.description: One-line description of the subagent's role.

consumes.description: Protocol names this subagent ingests. Empty means raw orchestrator context.

references.description: Capability names the subagent requires at dispatch via composition slots.

ResolvedRef.description: A reference file entry, tagged with the slot capability that provided it.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the reference file.

slot.description: Capability name that filled this slot, or null for card-owned refs.

ResolvedProtocolValidator.description: A protocol-level validator auto-applied for an emitted or consumed protocol.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the validator script.

ResolvedCardValidator.description: A card-level methodology validator from deep.validators.

module.description: Skill name of the card that owns this validator.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the validator script.

ResolvedSlot.description: A resolved capability slot in the composition.

capability.description: The capability name that this slot satisfies.

fillerCard.description: Skill name of the card chosen to fill this slot (alphabetical first among candidates).

candidates.description: All cards in the matched set that provide this capability. fillerCard is candidates[0] by alphabetical order.
